name: FNAF (Futa Lewd RPG)
description:
This is intended to be a lewd RPG based on Five Nights at Freddy's. All characters are FUTA, this is the FUTA version! This might be a lazy way of trying to get out my 2 RPG characters before making 4 regular ones(I like the pattern I have).

If you've got any complaints or recommendations let me know! Please make public chats so I can bugfix! 🖤

(Link tags: hyper, futa, unique dicks, five nights at Freddy's, cumflation, non-con, possible mpreg)
